这里是根据输入整理出的 YAML 初稿，请直接使用下方代码块中的内容。

```yaml
version: "1.0"
source:
  title: "Night Rain"
  author: "Demo Author"
  language: "zh-CN"
  chapter_count: 3
  chapters:
    - index: 1
      title: "Chapter 1"
      summary: "林琪深夜回到公寓，发现门锁似乎被动过。"
    - index: 2
      title: "Chapter 2"
      summary: "她在房间里找到一张陌生字条，怀疑有人潜入。"
    - index: 3
      title: "Chapter 3"
      summary: "第二天清晨，她决定顺着线索前往车站。"
adaptation:
  style: "Suspense Drama"
  audience: "General"
  notes: []
characters:
  - id: "char_linqi"
    name: "林琪"
    role: "protagonist"
    description: "追查陌生字条来源的女主角。"
locations:
  - id: "loc_apartment"
    name: "公寓"
    description: "林琪居住的旧公寓。"
  - id: "loc_station"
    name: "车站"
    description: "线索指向的清晨车站。"
scenes:
  - id: "scene_001"
    title: "Chapter 1"
    source_chapters: [1]
    slugline:
      interior_exterior: "INT"
      location_id: "loc_apartment"
      time: "NIGHT"
    summary: "林琪深夜回到公寓，发现门锁似乎被动过。"
    objective: "确认房间是否被入侵，并决定是否继续追查。"
    beats:
      - type: "action"
        content: "林琪停在门口，反复检查门锁上的细微划痕。"
      - type: "dialogue"
        character_id: "char_linqi"
        content: "有人来过这里。"
        emotion: "tense"
    notes:
      adaptation_reason: "把心理警觉转成可拍摄的门口停顿动作。"
      open_questions:
        - "是谁提前进入了林琪的房间？"
  - id: "scene_002"
    title: "Chapter 2"
    source_chapters: [2]
    slugline:
      interior_exterior: "INT"
      location_id: "loc_apartment"
      time: "NIGHT"
    summary: "林琪在房间里发现陌生字条，意识到威胁逼近。"
    objective: "确认入侵者是否刻意留下警告，并逼近核心威胁。"
    beats:
      - type: "action"
        content: "她在桌面下抽出字条，手指因为紧张而发白。"
      - type: "dialogue"
        character_id: "char_linqi"
        content: "今晚别睡？他到底想做什么？"
        emotion: "tense"
    notes:
      adaptation_reason: "用字条发现动作强化悬疑节奏。"
      open_questions:
        - "警告背后的人是在威胁林琪，还是在保护她？"
  - id: "scene_003"
    title: "Chapter 3"
    source_chapters: [3]
    slugline:
      interior_exterior: "EXT"
      location_id: "loc_station"
      time: "MORNING"
    summary: "林琪带着字条前往车站，决定主动追踪线索。"
    objective: "把被动受威胁转成主动追查。"
    beats:
      - type: "action"
        content: "清晨的车站里，林琪抓紧字条四处寻找可疑身影。"
      - type: "dialogue"
        character_id: "char_linqi"
        content: "不管是谁留下的，我一定要把人找出来。"
        emotion: "determined"
    notes:
      adaptation_reason: "把章节追踪意图外化成车站行动场面。"
      open_questions:
        - "车站里等待她的，是线索还是陷阱？"
validation:
  status: "passed"
  warnings: []
```

补充说明：如需落地拍摄，可进一步压缩第二场的对白长度。
